testcase.name: test_create_with_images_and_features
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:94: in test_create_with_images_and_features assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"literal_error","loc":["body","transmission"],"msg":"Input should be 'Automatik' or 'Schaltgetriebe'","input":"manuell","ctx":{"expected":"'Automatik' or 'Schaltgetriebe'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/literal_error"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_hard_delete_blocked_with_active_booking

testcase.name: test_guest_booking
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:425: in test_guest_booking assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"list_type","loc":["body","extras"],"msg":"Input should be a valid list","input":{},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/list_type"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"vehicle_id":"6457d458-02a4-4111-9a9c-83d18ae8294d","location_id":"loc-hamburg-hbf","start_date":"2032-01-01","end_date":"2032-01-03","extras":{},"discount_code":"","guest":{"email":"TEST_guest_c36f1d@rentfux.de","full_name":"Guest","phone":"+491700000003","address":"Hauptstr 1","postal_code":"20095","city":"Hamburg","birth_date":"1990-01-01","license_number":"B0001234","license_country":"DE"}},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","payment_method"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"vehicle_id":"6457d458-02a4-4111-9a9c-83d18ae8294d","location_id":"loc-hamburg-hbf","start_date":"2032-01-01","end_date":"2032-01-03","extras":{},"discount_code":"","guest":{"email":"TEST_guest_c36f1d@rentfux.de","full_name":"Guest","phone":"+491700000003","address":"Hauptstr 1","postal_code":"20095","city":"Hamburg","birth_date":"1990-01-01","license_number":"B0001234","license_country":"DE"}},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
